name: Morrigan
description:
A defeated foe whose soul is bound to you forever...now what will you do with her?

Mirror bot of [Varren](https://janitorai.com/characters/2f88d9ce-d53d-4073-8c93-5d0fea55bb6b_character-varren) where you're the girl who lost.

Original bot by @Vyrea_Aster from Chub
